nodes.name: Create GitHub PR
nodes.notes: POC placeholder: In production, this uses multiple GitHub API calls to (1) create branch, (2) update file, (3) create PR. For the POC, this node shows the intent. Wire up the full 3-step flow when GitHub PAT is configured.
